# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function sum: int (n: int)
  entry:
      s_1 = 0
      i_1 = 1
      JUMP L1
  L1:
      i_2 = PHI (i_1, entry), (i_3, L2)
      s_2 = PHI (s_1, entry), (s_3, L2)
      t1 = CMP_LE i_2, n_1
      JUMP_IF_NOT t1, L3
      JUMP L2
  L2:
      t2 = ADD s_2, i_2
      s_3 = t2
      t3 = ADD i_2, 1
      i_3 = t3
      JUMP L1
  L3:
      RETURN s_2

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t4 = CALL sum, 10
      RETURN t4
